title: prostanthera chlorantha
intro: Prostanthera chlorantha, also known as Green Balm, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Green Balm is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Prostanthera chlorantha include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
